title: NTLA Institutional Holdings and Shareholder Ownership
text: NTLA has 316 institutional owners and shareholders that have filed 13D/G or 13F forms with the Securities Exchange Commission (SEC), holding a total of 104,693,641 shares. 88.77% of the stock is owned by institutional investors and hedge funds. Top institutional holders include ARK Investment Management LLC, Vanguard Group Inc, BlackRock, Inc., State Street Corp, D. E. Shaw & Co., Regeneron Pharmaceuticals Inc, Two Sigma Investments, Lp, Geode Capital Management, and Morgan Stanley. In the most recent quarter, 186 institutional investors added shares of NTLA stock to their portfolio, and 121 decreased their positions. Vanguard Group Inc. increased its stake in shares of Intellia Therapeutics by 17.8% during the 4th quarter, owning 13,010,001 shares. State Street Corp lifted its stake by 29.1% in the 4th quarter, now owning 6,418,836 shares worth $57,705,000. In total, 277 hedge funds are holding NTLA as of their latest 13F filing.
